Internal function for select_types to search the index using fastmatch.

Source: R/pattern2fixed.R
search_index.Rd

Internal function for select_types to search the index using fastmatch.

Usage

search_index(pattern, index)

Arguments

index

an index object created by index_types

See also

index_types()

On this page
